speaker: seller
text: 2018 Camry LE, 78K miles, asking $18,495. Two things up front: there's a small shopping-cart dent on the rear passenger door — looks fine from a few feet but you'll see it under bright light. And I'd price our fair-value at closer to $17,800 given the cosmetic note. Happy to walk you through everything.

speaker: seller
text: Yes — and one note there too: prior owner went 4,000 miles past their 62K oil interval. Topped off, no documented engine damage, but I'd factor that into the price.

speaker: buyer
text: Anything else I should know? Accidents, title issues?

speaker: seller
text: Clean title, no reported accidents. The two items I mentioned are it.

speaker: buyer
text: What's the real bottom number you can do?

speaker: seller
text: Given the two cosmetic/maintenance items, I think a fair landing is around $17,000–$17,400.

speaker: seller
text: Meet me at $17,200 and we have a deal.
